settings.text:

- Lisa D.

settings.warning_text: Only our brand guarantees the high quality product used by thousands for pain relief.

settings.answer_1:
Support your dog’s hips, joints, and mobility with our Advanced Hip & Joint Support Chews. Carefully crafted with glucosamine, chondroitin, MSM, turmeric, green-lipped mussel, and omega-rich fish oil, this daily formula is designed to keep your pup moving with ease and comfort — no matter their age.

✓ Vet-approved, science-backed formula

✓ All-natural ingredients, no fillers or artificial nasties

✓ Tailored for long-term mobility & joint strength
settings.answer_2:
Give daily, just like a treat.

  • Small dogs (under 25 lbs): 1 chew per day
  • Medium dogs (25–50 lbs): 2 chews per day
  • Large dogs (50–75 lbs): 3 chews per day
  • Giant breeds (75+ lbs): 4 chews per day

Pro tip: Use mealtime or playtime as the perfect moment to serve up Ruffes. Dogs love the taste, so no hiding in peanut butter required.
settings.answer_3:
We ship directly from our US-based fulfillment centers within 1–2 business days.

Standard delivery times:

🇺🇸 US: 3–5 business days

🇨🇦 Canada: 5–8 business days

🌍 International: 7–14 business days

Every order is backed by our 30-day happiness guarantee. If you’re not fully satisfied, return your product — even if opened — for a full refund. No hassle, no risk.

settings.paragraph_text: Scientific studies show that 1 in 5 adult dogs over 5, and 8 in 10 dogs over 8, struggle with painful joint problems. Our chews contain well-researched active ingredients designed to support flexibility and mobility.

settings.subtitle_text: Act now to help your pups joint health and give them a great life.

settings.review_quote: I can't believe how youthful my 7-year-old Australian shepherd was acting! Guess you really can teach an old dog new tricks
As a licensed Vet, I could not live without PawPro products! Not only do I stand by the formula, but the results speak for themselves!
Im a vet passionate about bone health, and PawPro is the only brand I would recommend to others!

settings.video_text: J'ai pu me sentir soit plus créative.
settings.review_quote: We knew that with our girls being a larger breed, we would need to take care of their joints at some point. We found Ruffes and never looked back

settings.step_description:
Glucosamine & Chondroitin work together to help restore joint cushioning, slow cartilage breakdown, and improve flexibility.

Think of them as the foundation — strengthening your dog’s joints from the inside out.

MSM, Green-Lipped Mussel, Yucca & Omega-3s naturally target cellular inflammation that causes stiffness and soreness.

This eases discomfort and keeps your pup moving more comfortably day-to-day.

Hyaluronic Acid boosts natural joint fluid, acting like “oil for the hinges” so joints glide smoothly.

With better lubrication, your dog can run, jump, and play with less strain.

Improved blood flow and oxygen delivery (supported by MSM & Omega-3s) enhance recovery and tissue repair.

This keeps your dog’s joints resilient after exercise or daily activity.

Vitamin C and natural plant extracts protect against oxidative stress and support collagen production.

Combined with nutrient-rich flavors like coconut oil, honey, and liver, every chew works to fuel long-term joint strength.
